# MountainFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable MountainFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mountainfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://mountainfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.mountainfyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/mountainfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/mountainfyi-embed
- API: https://mountainfyi.com/developers/

## Geo FYI Widget Family

- [DistanceFYI Widget](https://widget.distancefyi.com)
- [QuakeFYI Widget](https://widget.quakefyi.com)
- [ZipFYI Widget](https://widget.zipfyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
